message:
fix(raptorq): add test-only governance bypass for deterministic decoder policy tests

Add a thread-local TEST_BYPASS_GOVERNANCE flag and bypass_governance()
helper that allows decoder policy unit tests to skip the G7 governance
override layer. This is needed because governance decisions depend on
statistical state that varies across seeds and matrix dimensions, making
it impossible to assert specific policy modes when governance can
silently override them.

The governance integration itself remains active in production and in
the G7-specific test suite. Four existing decoder policy tests that
assert specific mode selection now call set_test_bypass_governance(true)
to isolate the low-level policy logic from the governance overlay.
Test seeds and parameters adjusted for reliable mode triggers under
the bypass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
